verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I heard the wondrous love song It made my heart rejoice Knew it was only a mocking bird sing But I've heard your voice On a quiet twilight evening Gazed at the summer sky One by one Stars are came out But I saw your eyes

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And You're everywhere In everything You're in the new Fallen the winter snow The flowers in spring You're in my heart You're on my mind You're everywhere In everything All the time.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I felt the soft breeze tremble As i wondered down the land And the music it made As it rusted the leaves I've heard you call my name And unexpected shower Came out of the sky so clear I knew it was only The rain on the face But it fell like tears
